calendar.matters:
Motion For Cost Of Proof Sanctions; Declaration Of Derek T. Lawson In Support Thereof
Off Calendar May-25-2022 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. DEAN HAKKAK, Esq. of First Law Group, APC (Tel: 626-838-5700) for plaintiff;
Atty. DEREK T. LAWSON, Esq. of Haight Brown & Bonesteel LLP (Tel: 213-542-8000) for defendants Sherman Lewis Wright, Ford Motor Company, and Chariot Transit, Inc.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS SHERMAN WRIGHT, FORD MOTOR COMPANY, and CHARIOT TRANSIT, INC.'s Motion For Cost Of Proof Sanctions.

Both sides stipulate to the matter being decided by the pro tem judge. The pro tem judge and counsel for both sides (all appearing remotely) authorize the clerk to sign the formal stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS' MOTION PURSUANT TO THE PROVISION OF CCP SECTION 2033.420(a) FOR THE IMPOSITION OF SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,72.63 IN COSTS AND $15,436.50 IN ATTORNEYS' FEES IS DENIED. SECTION 2033.420(a) IS NOT INTENDED TO BE A COST SHIFING DEVICE SIMPLY BECAUSE PLAINTIFF PREVAILED IN THE UNDERLYING LITIGATION. DEFENDANTS HAVE FAILED TO IDENTIFY ANY SPECIFIC COSTS OR FEES WHICH WERE INCURRED SOLELY BECAUSE THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS WERE DENIED..

Counsel for plaintiff to prepare and submit a proposed order to the pro tem judge at rennepar85@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
